title: TinyML on Edge Devices: Bringing AI to the Physical World
subtitle: Zero latency, ultra-low power, and real inference at the sensor level
description: How TinyML enables machine learning inference directly on microcontrollers and edge devices, transforming IoT, seismology sensors, and real-time monitoring.
excerpt: Zero latency. Ultra-low power. Real inference at the sensor level. TinyML inverts the cloud-first AI paradigm — and the implications for seismic monitoring are profound.
hero_caption: A microcontroller running a trained neural network — processing seismic signals locally with no cloud dependency.
hero_aria: Microcontroller board with neural network overlay visualization
